mapper.insert: insert into errand_orders( order_no, user_id, errand_type, title, description, pickup_address, delivery_address, contact_name, contact_phone, pickup_code, expected_time_range, reward, tip, total_amount, images, deadline, order_status, remark, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{errandType}, #{title}, #{description}, #{pickupAddress}, #{deliveryAddress}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{pickupCode}, #{expectedTimeRange}, #{reward}, #{tip}, #{totalAmount}, #{images}, #{deadline}, #{orderStatus}, #{remark}, now(), now() )
mapper.update:
update errand_orders set order_status = #{status}, update_time = now() , runner_id = #{runnerId}, accepted_at = now() , completed_at = now() where order_no = #{orderNo}
and runner_id is null and order_status in (1, 3)
and order_status in (2,3) and runner_id is not null
and order_status = 2 and runner_id is not null
mapper.select: select * from errand_orders where order_status = #{status} order by create_time desc
select * from errand_orders where runner_id is null and order_status in (0, 1, 3) order by create_time desc

select e.*, u.nickname as runner_nickname, u.phone as runner_phone from errand_orders e left join users u on e.runner_id = u.user_id
e.user_id = #{userId} and (e.hidden_from_user = 0 or e.hidden_from_user is null)
and e.order_status in (0, 1, 2, 3, 7)
and e.order_status = #{status}
order by e.create_time desc
select * from errand_orders where runner_id = #{runnerId} order by create_time desc
mapper.update: update errand_orders set order_status = #{status}, update_time = now() where order_id = #{orderId}
